title: Misri
overview: Carefree photographer Arjun lives and works with his uncle Sam, who owns a wedding photography agency. At a destination wedding, he meets pottery instructor Pooja and the two agree for a short-lived fling. For the first time, Arjun feels genuine emotion, but Pooja ends it as planned.
